MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF DAGOVITZ, MELVIN SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR JUN-01-1998 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 611 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON JUN-08-1998 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WAYLAND, KENNETH THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 640 POLK STREET #504 SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA $400.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $400.00, STAYED UNTIL JUL-03-1998, LEASE FORFEITED, IF DEFT. VACATES BY 7/3/98 AND MAKES THE $400.00 PAYMENT DIRECTLY TO PLTF. ON OR BEFORE 5:00 P.M. ON 6/3/98 WRIT WILL BE STAYED THROUGH 7/3/98 AT 5:00 P.M. SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH FOR ADDITIONAL DETAILS.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DAGOVITZ, MELVIN AS TO DEFENDANT WAYLAND, KENNETH DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED

C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. JUDGE PRO TEM, MICHAEL RAIF- SNIDER, PRO TEM. D. CARTER, CLERK. CLAUDIA GALLAGHER, CSR. PRESENT WAS PLAINTIFF'S PROPERTY MANAGER PAUL COMISAK, WITH AUTHORITY TO SETTLE THE ACTION. PLAINTIFF MELVIN DAGOVITZ WAS NOT PRESENT, HOWEVER HIS ATTORNEY OF RECORD, ARNOLD W. EVJE II WAS PRESENT. ASLO PRESENT IN PRO PER WAS DEFENDANT, KENNETH WAYLAND. CASE SETTLED BY STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OFJUDGMENT. SEE CLERK MINUTES FOR DETAILS.
